utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the required format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, all 7 items appear. Now check completeness: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – complete. 2) travel_dates: provided (June 20–24, 2024) – specific dates – complete. 3) transportation: flight details with costs – type=Flights, round-trip budget airline economy from Paris, cost €400 – includes origin but lacks specific flight numbers/times; however the format only requires flight details with costs, which is satisfied – complete. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs – type Hotel, name Family Haven Hotel, duration 4 nights, cost €700 – complete. 5) activities: list with names and costs – provided for four activities – complete. 6) additional_services: provided as None – acceptable. 7) total_budget: breakdown provided with flights_accommodation, activities, total_planned_cost, remaining, original_budget – complete. One caveat: user asked for restaurants; the required format does not include restaurants, so it is not counted. Therefore, all 7/7 required items are included and sufficiently specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: Destination is 'Prague, Czech Republic' which matches the destinations list. Transportation is 'Round-trip on a Budget Airline, Economy Class from Paris' which corresponds to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class. Accommodation is 'Family Haven Hotel' which matches the accommodation list. Activities include 'City Walking Tour', 'Prague Zoo' (maps to 'Zoo'), 'Museum Day Pass', and 'Kids Show (Disney musical)' (maps to 'Kids show'). For each of these, I matched the exact or closest named item in the ground-truth and retrieved its rating.
